title: T-019 — UI: P1 modal suite (OEE-M-001/002/006/008/009/012) + annotate downtime Server Action (15-OEE-d)
prompt:
# T-019 — P1 modal suite

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §15.4 modal contracts (OEE-M-001, M-002, M-006, M-008, M-009, M-012), §11 V-OEE-DATA (annotate window)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototypes: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/modals.jsx:19-93 (annotate_downtime_modal), :95-161 (export_oee_modal), :261-298 (changeover_detail_modal), :328-348 (request_edit_modal), :372-408 (copy_clipboard_modal), :486-509 (auto_refresh_pause_modal)

## Goal
Ship the 6 P1 modals consumed by OEE-001/002/003: Annotate Downtime (OEE-M-001) + Export (OEE-M-002) + Changeover Detail (OEE-M-006) + Request Edit Escalation (OEE-M-008) + Copy Clipboard (OEE-M-009) + Auto-refresh Pause (OEE-M-012). Each matches its prototype 1:1; OEE-M-001 + OEE-M-008 ship a Server Action (annotate downtime; escalate). Heavy admin modals (OEE-M-003/004/005) deferred to T-021.

## Implementation contract
1. Six modal client components under `apps/web/app/(oee)/_components/modals/`:
   - `annotate-downtime-modal.tsx` (OEE-M-001) — Dialog + RHF+Zod {notes z.string().min(1).max(500), catOverride z.string()}; submit → Server Action `annotateDowntime` (RBAC `oee.downtime.annotate`); writes outbox event via T-010 pattern after success; computed `editWindowClosed` (event.ended_at + 3600s < now()).
   - `export-oee-modal.tsx` (OEE-M-002) — Dialog + RHF+Zod {format z.enum(['csv','pdf']), sections z.object({...})}; submit → calls T-013 export action; XLSX option feature-flag gated (`oee.export.xlsx_enabled`).
   - `changeover-detail-modal.tsx` (OEE-M-006) — Dialog max-w-3xl read-only with summary grid + cross-link Next.js `<Link href="/production/changeover/${id}">`.
   - `request-edit-modal.tsx` (OEE-M-008) — Dialog dismissible=false + RHF reason min(10); submit → Server Action `escalateDowntimeEdit` (RBAC `oee.downtime.escalate`); writes audit log + in-app notification to nearest oee_supervisor.
   - `copy-clipboard-modal.tsx` (OEE-M-009) — Dialog with KPI <pre> + client-side useClipboard hook + Sonner toast; data from oee_daily_summary for requested date.
   - `auto-refresh-pause-modal.tsx` (OEE-M-012) — Dialog max-w-sm + ToggleGroup minutes selector; persists pauseUntil in zustand atom; polling hook in OEE-001/002/003 reads atom.
2. Server Actions `apps/web/app/(oee)/_actions/annotate-downtime.ts` and `escalate-downtime-edit.ts` per RBAC + outbox + audit log contract; permission strings from T-001 enum.
3. RTL tests per modal asserting Dialog primitive + parity vs prototype line range + form Zod validation + Server Action gates (permission denied → 403 thrown).

## Files
- apps/web/app/(oee)/_components/modals/annotate-downtime-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/_components/modals/export-oee-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/_components/modals/changeover-detail-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/_components/modals/request-edit-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/_components/modals/copy-clipboard-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/_components/modals/auto-refresh-pause-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/_actions/annotate-downtime.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/_actions/escalate-downtime-edit.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/_components/modals/__tests__/annotate-downtime-modal.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/_components/modals/__tests__/modal-suite-parity.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given each modal renders, when compared to its prototype line range in prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/modals.jsx (OEE-M-001 lines 19-93, OEE-M-002 lines 95-161, OEE-M-006 lines 261-298, OEE-M-008 lines 328-348, OEE-M-009 lines 372-408, OEE-M-012 lines 486-509), then primitives, fields, and footer match per RTL parity checklist (Dialog vs window.Modal mapping per translation note: size='sm'→max-w-sm, 'wide'→max-w-3xl).
2. Given annotate-downtime form submitted with empty notes, when validated, then Zod rejects with min(1) error; given a user without oee.downtime.annotate permission submits valid form, when Server Action runs, then it throws 403 and no outbox row is written.
3. Given a downtime event with ended_at older than 1h, when annotate-downtime-modal is rendered for it, then editWindowClosed=true and the [Save note] CTA is disabled with `[Request edit →]` shortcut to OEE-M-008.
4. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact + Playwright trace per modal per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL test per modal + Server Action permission test asserting all four ACs.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run app/(oee)/_components/modals && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run app/(oee)/_actions`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui (§0 ESLint rule).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to shadcn Dialog + RHF+Zod.
- Do not skip RBAC checks in Server Actions — permission strings from T-001 enum (oee.downtime.annotate, oee.downtime.escalate, oee.export.csv/pdf).
- Do not bypass editWindowClosed computation — V-OEE data integrity gate (translation note).
- Do not emit outbox events directly from the modal — Server Action writes outbox row consumed by T-010 dispatcher.
- Do not include OEE-M-003/004/005 here (admin/override/big-loss — T-021).

pipeline_inputs.description: Six P1 modals (OEE-M-001/002/006/008/009/012) + Server Actions annotateDowntime / escalateDowntimeEdit matching modals.jsx prototypes 1:1.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Closes part of Auditor A OEE-004. Modal-to-shadcn mapping per translation note §3. RBAC strings from T-001 enum. OEE-M-001 + OEE-M-008 require Server Action with outbox + audit log; others are read-only or client-only ergonomics. OEE-M-010 (Compare Weeks, P1.5 BL-OEE-05) deferred — amendment OEE-PRD-AMEND-03.

Additional acceptance detail: UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact + Playwright trace per modal per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.

Given annotate-downtime form submitted with empty notes, when validated, then Zod rejects with min(1); given a user without oee.downtime.annotate submits valid form, when Server Action runs, then it throws 403 and no outbox row is written
Given a downtime event with ended_at older than 1h, when annotate-downtime-modal renders, then editWindowClosed=true and [Save note] CTA is disabled with [Request edit →] shortcut to OEE-M-008
Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact + Playwright trace per modal per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`

Capture screenshots and Playwright trace for UI parity; attach artifact paths in closeout
